'''鈭歝h-f-g''' ('''kachafag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rightle|rightle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-f-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rightle|rightle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-f-g
|-
! Lemma
| kachafag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichafag|thichafag]] || [[word:jichafag|jichafag]] || [[word:shichafag|shichafag]] || [[word:kichafag|kichafag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchafag|thuthuchafag]] || [[word:jujuchafag|jujuchafag]] || [[word:shushuchafag|shushuchafag]] || [[word:kukuchafag|kukuchafag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchafag|thuchafag]] || [[word:juchafag|juchafag]] || [[word:shuchafag|shuchafag]] || [[word:kuchafag|kuchafag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchafag|thuchafag]] || [[word:juchafag|juchafag]] || [[word:shuchafag|shuchafag]] || [[word:kuchafag|kuchafag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechafag|thechafag]] || [[word:jechafag|jechafag]] || [[word:shechafag|shechafag]] || [[word:kechafag|kechafag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochafag|thothochafag]] || [[word:jojochafag|jojochafag]] || [[word:shoshochafag|shoshochafag]] || [[word:kokochafag|kokochafag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochafag|thochafag]] || [[word:jochafag|jochafag]] || [[word:shochafag|shochafag]] || [[word:kochafag|kochafag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochafag|thochafag]] || [[word:jochafag|jochafag]] || [[word:shochafag|shochafag]] || [[word:kochafag|kochafag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chafag|th忙chafag]] || [[word:j忙chafag|j忙chafag]] || [[word:sh忙chafag|sh忙chafag]] || [[word:k忙chafag|k忙chafag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachafag|thathachafag]] || [[word:jajachafag|jajachafag]] || [[word:shashachafag|shashachafag]] || [[word:kakachafag|kakachafag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachafag|thachafag]] || [[word:jachafag|jachafag]] || [[word:shachafag|shachafag]] || [[word:kachafag|kachafag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachafag|thachafag]] || [[word:jachafag|jachafag]] || [[word:shachafag|shachafag]] || [[word:kachafag|kachafag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachafag|shachafag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachafag|goshachafag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachafag|gokishachafag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachafagn眉|shachafagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachafagnkn眉|goshachafagnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachafagn眉|gokishachafagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachafagsh毛|shachafagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachafagnksh毛|goshachafagnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachafagsh毛|gokishachafagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachafagro|shachafagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachafagnkro|goshachafagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachafagro|gokishachafagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachafagmu|shachafagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachafagnkmu|goshachafagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachafagmu|gokishachafagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachafagsher|shachafagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachafagnksher|goshachafagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachafagsher|gokishachafagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachafagng|shachafagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachafagnkng|goshachafagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachafagng|gokishachafagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachafagya|shachafagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachafagnkya|goshachafagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachafagya|gokishachafagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachafagyam|shachafagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachafagnkyam|goshachafagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachafagyam|gokishachafagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachafagn眉sh毛|shachafagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachafagnkn眉sh毛|goshachafagnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachafagn眉sh毛|gokishachafagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachafagn眉ro|shachafagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachafagnkn眉ro|goshachafagnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachafagn眉ro|gokishachafagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachafagn眉mu|shachafagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachafagnkn眉mu|goshachafagnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachafagn眉mu|gokishachafagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachafagsh毛n眉|shachafagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachafagnksh毛n眉|goshachafagnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachafagsh毛n眉|gokishachafagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachafagsh毛ro|shachafagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachafagnksh毛ro|goshachafagnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachafagsh毛ro|gokishachafagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachafagsh毛mu|shachafagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachafagnksh毛mu|goshachafagnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachafagsh毛mu|gokishachafagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachafagron眉|shachafagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachafagnkron眉|goshachafagnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachafagron眉|gokishachafagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachafagrosh毛|shachafagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachafagnkrosh毛|goshachafagnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachafagrosh毛|gokishachafagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachafagromu|shachafagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachafagnkromu|goshachafagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachafagromu|gokishachafagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachafagmun眉|shachafagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachafagnkmun眉|goshachafagnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachafagmun眉|gokishachafagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachafagmush毛|shachafagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachafagnkmush毛|goshachafagnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachafagmush毛|gokishachafagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachafagmuro|shachafagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachafagnkmuro|goshachafagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachafagmuro|gokishachafagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
